CustomField.description: MIS-7386 GM Owner Approval Process Update In Case
CustomField.formula: IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'APAC'), 'APAC', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'Japan'), 'Japan', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'Trellian'), 'Trellian', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'India'), 'India', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'SEA'), 'SEA', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'Maestros'), 'Maestros', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'Australia'), 'Australia', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'OEM'), 'OEM', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'Agencies Strategic'), 'Agencies Strategic', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'Consultancies'), 'Consultancies', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'LATAM'), 'LATAM', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'NA Enterprise'), 'NA Enterprise', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'NA Strategic'), 'NA Strategic', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'NA SMB'), 'NA SMB', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'Mexico'), 'Mexico', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'Brazil'), 'Brazil', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'Colombia'), 'Colombia', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'EMEA'), 'EMEA', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'Turkey'), 'Turkey', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'Italy'), 'Italy', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'Investors'), 'Investors', IF(CONTAINS(SysRoleName__c, 'Rank Ranger'), 'Rank Ranger', 'Other'))))))))))))))))))))))
CustomField.label: Role's Region
